channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-10433] cfs_hash_destroy()) ASSERTION( !cfs_hash_with_assert_empty(hs) ) failed: hash lu_site_osd-zfs bucket 3(1) is not empty: 1 items left
item.description:
This seems to imply some sort of a cleanup problem for mdd-survey.

I hi this by doing make distclean in my build tree while sanity.sh was running and so it failed and then failed to cleanup I guess.

[446668.581081] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 225a: Metadata survey sanity with zero-stripe ========================================= 00:03:52 (1514005432)
[446669.900084] LustreError: 13007:0:(echo_client.c:1795:echo_md_lookup()) lookup MDT0000-tests: rc = -2
[446669.902193] LustreError: 13007:0:(echo_client.c:2027:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child MDT0000-tests: rc = -2
[446823.607961] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 225b: Metadata survey sanity with stripe_count = 1 ==================================== 00:06:27 (1514005587)
[446824.709130] LustreError: 31575:0:(echo_client.c:1795:echo_md_lookup()) lookup MDT0000-tests: rc = -2
[446824.731978] LustreError: 31575:0:(echo_client.c:1795:echo_md_lookup()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[446824.735717] LustreError: 31575:0:(echo_client.c:2027:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child MDT0000-tests: rc = -2
[446824.740322] LustreError: 31575:0:(echo_client.c:2027:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[447024.304815] Lustre: Unmounted lustre-client
[447024.427247] LustreError: 164-3: Can't find the device name (need mount option 'device=...')
[447024.428806] LustreError: 24705:0:(obd_mount.c:1419:lmd_parse()) Bad mount options user_xattr,flock
[447024.429745] LustreError: 24705:0:(obd_mount.c:1507:lustre_fill_super()) Unable to mount  (-22)
[447291.721845] sysctl (14834): drop_caches: 2
[447298.071029] sh (15312): drop_caches: 2
[447314.214683] LustreError: 16631:0:(mgs_handler.c:1582:mgs_device_fini()) header@ffff880257355040[0x0, 1, [0x200000003:0x0:0x0] hash exist]{

[447314.216987] LustreError: 16631:0:(mgs_handler.c:1582:mgs_device_fini()) ....local_storage@ffff880257355090

[447314.218709] LustreError: 16631:0:(mgs_handler.c:1582:mgs_device_fini()) ....osd-zfs@ffff88024ee18de8osd-zfs-object@ffff88024ee18de8

[447314.220805] LustreError: 16631:0:(mgs_handler.c:1582:mgs_device_fini()) } header@ffff880257355040

[447314.383840] LustreError: 16631:0:(osd_handler.c:1264:osd_device_free()) header@ffff880257355040[0x0, 1, [0x200000003:0x0:0x0] hash exist]{

[447314.385775] LustreError: 16631:0:(osd_handler.c:1264:osd_device_free()) ....local_storage@ffff880257355090

[447314.387236] LustreError: 16631:0:(osd_handler.c:1264:osd_device_free()) ....osd-zfs@ffff88024ee18de8osd-zfs-object@ffff88024ee18de8

[447314.388665] LustreError: 16631:0:(osd_handler.c:1264:osd_device_free()) } header@ffff880257355040

[447314.390150] LustreError: 16631:0:(hash.c:1111:cfs_hash_destroy()) ASSERTION( !cfs_hash_with_assert_empty(hs) ) failed: hash lu_site_osd-zfs bucket 3(1) is not  empty: 1 items left
[447314.399178] LustreError: 16631:0:(hash.c:1111:cfs_hash_destroy()) LBUG
[447314.414803] Pid: 16631, comm: umount
[447314.415504] 
Call Trace:
[447314.440545]  [<ffffffffa020a7ce>] libcfs_call_trace+0x4e/0x60 [libcfs]

[447314.456735]  [<ffffffff811f0926>] deactivate_super+0x46/0x60

item.summary: cfs_hash_destroy()) ASSERTION( !cfs_hash_with_assert_empty(hs) ) failed: hash lu_site_osd-zfs bucket 3(1) is not empty: 1 items left

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
